sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, content String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello world'), (2, 'ClickHouse is powerful'), (3, 'Fuzz testing ClickHouse');
UPDATE test_strings SET content = 'Fuzzing is fun!' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE multiMatchAny(content, ['Hello', 'testing']) = 1;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE multiMatchAny(content, ['not found', 'ClickHouse']) = 0;
